transcript.text:
This game will begin as she enters with a white authentic uniform
Let's take a look at the line-up
Red uniform
I wonder if they will use this uniform and formation
It's very drool-worthy
Let the game begin Starting from the right field
The Korean cheering squad is here with us as well
The first initial goal will be very crucial
GOAL!!!
That's an amazing goal
A nice shot indeed
Now just passing 1 minute for the first half
That should be a penalty
[What will happen to Tzuyang?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Shinchon today

There's a steakhouse here
I've seen it so many times on YouTube
There's a mukbang challenge that consists of eating 1.5kg steak in under 20 minutes
[Steak 300 located in Changcheon-dong]
Hello~
Can I do the 1.5kg steak challenge right now?
Yes You would need to eat everything on the plate including the rice and the garnish
Under 20 minutes? Yes
[Can you do it?]
1.5kg of meat
I did 1.5kg pork in 7 minutes
[2020. 11. 25 Whole Roasted Pork under 7 minutes challenge!]
[Wearing the same t-shirt]
[Successfully finished]
I ate that pretty fast
A lot of people worry about me when I eat fast

So I'll eat slowly
That's just an excuse just in case I fail the challenge
[1.5kg Steak Challenge]
It's coming
Be careful, the grill is hot
The steak is here
It looks so good
They said I can cut it up to get it ready
So tender
Let's cut it
Cuts like butter
Looks delicious
Amazing
Very tender
Ribeye
Do I need to finish the onions?

I won't count that against you since you're Tzuyang (joking)
No no no don't do that It's okay
PD: You can't do that! (joking)
[I'm a fan]
It's so tender It's going to be great
I was given 5 chunks of meat
5 of them
They used to give a whole baked potato
But changed it to french fries about a month ago
With 5 pieces of steak
I need to hurry and eat before the juice dries out
We'll start now then
Starting with the small pieces because it's still hot
You can do it, Tzuyang!
Fighting!
Let's not put too much pressure on her

[Pressure]
So good
Very savory
Amazing
Really tender
[A melody of compliments]
Tasty~!
[Yes, this is a challenge mukbang...]
[Did she forget that this mukbang is time-sensitive?]
[Wasabi]
Just like butter
Yummy
It melts in my mouth The steak and wasabi combination is just amazing
[3 minutes have elapsed]
I love the steak cooked medium-rare
[You won't beat the challenge at this rate]

Wasabi just like butter
Why must we eat this delicious steak so fast?
Although I'm not even eating fast at all
[Miss ma'am, you need to hurry up]
[5 minutes have elapsed]
Well, steak is just...
Just delicious
[Wait...]
[Isn't this a challenge mukbang?]
Oh, right
7 minutes already?
That was quick
[Let's get it started]
[Gas it]
I can't swallow the meat right away like noodles
[Don't forget to chew your food]

[10 minutes have elapsed]
[Almost halfway done]
Slice thinly
Although steak should be eaten in big bites
It was so tender at first so it was easy to eat
[12 minutes have elapsed]
I don't think I can finish this in time
8 minutes left?
[Don't jump ship just yet!]
[Inaudible]
[She says she wants some wasabi]
I forgot about the rice
Spoon, please
Use the fork?
[I don't think so]
Thank you

You've done a great job so far
But the last obstacle
The veggies
I might just not eat it at all
It seems like a success to me so far
I should've started eating the rice from the start
Eating just the rice is really bland
[Adding flavor]
Just like curry
Not bad
Why's rice so good?
Strange
[Korean]
It's good
Finished
As many fries as possible

[Vegetables]
I hate it
What is this?
[What is this green thing?]
Green beans
Green bean?
[Let's just laugh it off]
I should beat the challenge since they're cheering me on, right?
I'm not eating fast for the challenge I just want to get rid of them asap
Just swallow it right away without tasting it
[A pile of veggies]
[Endure the hard times]
[It may seem like she's drinking poison]
[Next pile]
1 minute left
[There's no time left]

[50 seconds left!]
[Last pieces of pineapple]
[Finished]
You did it with 28 seconds left!
28 seconds!?
Thank you
I was just going to count it as success when you were down to the vegetables
[Very biased just because she's Tzuyang?]
I tend to waive that for everyone here If they are close enough, then I count it as success
Not because she's Tzuyang?
Then why didn't you tell me that earlier before I ate the veggies!?
Because you were doing well! Tzuyang: I'm joking
I was enjoying the show
I regret eating the veggies
Sir, can I order 1 more?
I've been eyeing the chuck flap

[Chuck Flap Steak]
Thank you~
You guys again...
I love chuck flap It's 400g worth
Let's cut against the grain
Looks good
Not into too many pieces because the meat juice can drip out
Medium-rare
It's seasoned very well
Put some wasabi on top
It's chewy
[Shall we finish it up?]
[1 last bite]
[Finished with the challenge mukbang!]
[A ceremonial picture][
[Onto the wall of fame]
